TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_sowal_no_misatimolay_a_finacadan_i_Taywan, title = O_sowal_no_misatimolay_a_finacadan_i_Taywan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_sowal_no_misatimolay_a_finacadan_i_Taywan} }

S.FORM: == Sowal no Satimolay-kanatanatal == O Sowal noSatimolay-kanatanatal a finacadan i Taywan O sowal no Yincumincu han no mita o 'Amis, Tolo polo ira ko tolo ko nika sasiromaroma no sowal, ano songila'en haca a misapinang ko kakakonis no polong nonini a sowal i, edeng malatolo ko tapangan no rayray —ono Tayal, ono Pariwan, ato no Cuwik. Safaw pito a 'ofadan no tamdaw ko cisowalay tonini a sowal. O roma sato, o sowal no Fotod a tamdaw haw i, o masapapotalay no Sowal no Misatimolay a finacadan i Taywan, o teloc no Patanik hananay a finacadan i Filiping cangra. O sowal no Misatimolay i Taywan i, o tadakakalimelaan no mikingkiway to sowal, enawhani, o ma'araway a kalo'a'adopen ato kalopinalomaloma no 'aya'ayaw a 'orip, ira a ma'araw i finacadan no Taywan. Itini a mahapinang a mafana' kita to o tatapangan nonini a Misatimolay kita o i Taywanay. Pakayni tonini a sowal ato ma'araway a kalomaamaan, paso'lin ko 'alomanay a hakasi^ no mikingkiway to sowal, o tatapangan no Misatimolay a finacadan ko Taywan saan. O micidekay a kasasiroma no Sowal no Misatimolay a finacadan itiniay i Taywan haw i, materek ko i 'aya'ayaway a katelangay a sowal ato rayray no 'orip no itiya:ay ho a tamdaw. O ngiha' no sowal, sepat ko tatapangan a ngiha',o padamaay a ngiha' haw i, ira ko masapinangay ato makalengay, nikaorira caay kasadak ko fali, caay ka matiya o ngarngar no holam ko sowal no Misatimoaly, o makakafitay ko tilid, ira ko lamit ira ko ciping,makakafit kora haw i, masapokopokoh ko tilid. Pakayniay i cefang no sowal i, o damac ko pakakafitay ta masapinang masongila'ay a tengilen ko sowal.
S.PHON: == so~uwaɾ no~u satimo~uɾaj-kanatanataɾ == o~u so~uwaɾ no~usatimo~uɾaj-kanatanataɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan o~u so~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u~u ħan no~u mita o~u ʡamis, to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~u ira ko~u to~uɾo~u ko~u nika sasiro~umaro~uma no~u so~uwaɾ, ano~u so~uŋiɾaʡən ħaʦa a misapinaŋ ko~u kakako~unis no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~unini a so~uwaɾ i, əɬ~ɮəŋ maɾato~uɾo~u ko~u tapaŋan no~u rajraj *o~uno~u tajaɾ, o~uno~u pariwan, ato~u no~u ʦo~u~uwik. safaw pito~u a ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʦiso~uwaɾaj to~unini a so~uwaɾ. o~u ro~uma sato~u, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw ħaw i, o~u masapapo~utaɾaj no~u so~uwaɾ no~u misatimo~uɾaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan, o~u təɾo~uʦ no~u patanik ħananaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i fiɾipiŋ ʦaŋra. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u misatimo~uɾaj i tajwan i, o~u taɬ~ɮakakaɾiməɾaan no~u mikiŋkiwaj to~u so~uwaɾ, ənawħani, o~u maʡarawaj a kaɾo~uʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən ato~u kaɾo~upinaɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u ʡajaʡajaw a ʡo~urip, ira a maʡaraw i finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u tajwan. itini a maħapinaŋ a mafanaʡ kita to~u o~u tatapaŋan no~unini a misatimo~uɾaj kita o~u i tajwanaj. pakajni to~unini a so~uwaɾ ato~u maʡarawaj a kaɾo~umaamaan, paso~uʡɾin ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a ħakasiʔ no~u mikiŋkiwaj to~u so~uwaɾ, o~u tatapaŋan no~u misatimo~uɾaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u tajwan saan. o~u miʦiɬ~ɮəkaj a kasasiro~uma no~u so~uwaɾ no~u misatimo~uɾaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan itiniaj i tajwan ħaw i, matərək ko~u i ʡajaʡajawaj a katəɾaŋaj a so~uwaɾ ato~u rajraj no~u ʡo~urip no~u itija:aj ħo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u ŋiħaʡ no~u so~uwaɾ, səpat ko~u tatapaŋan a ŋiħaʡ,o~u paɬ~ɮamaaj a ŋiħaʡ ħaw i, ira ko~u masapinaŋaj ato~u makaɾəŋaj, nikao~urira ʦaaj kasaɬ~ɮak ko~u faɾi, ʦaaj ka matija o~u ŋarŋar no~u ħo~uɾam ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u misatimo~uaɾj, o~u makakafitaj ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u ɾamit ira ko~u ʦipiŋ,makakafit ko~ura ħaw i, masapo~uko~upo~uko~uħ ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. pakajniaj i ʦəfaŋ no~u so~uwaɾ i, o~u ɬ~ɮamaʦ ko~u pakakafitaj ta masapinaŋ maso~uŋiɾaʡaj a təŋiɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ.
S.FORM: == Sowal no Satimolay-kanatanatal == O Sowal noSatimolay-kanatanatal a finacadan i Taywan O sowal no Yincumincu han no mita o 'Amis, Tolo polo ira ko tolo ko nika sasiromaroma no sowal, ano songila'en haca a misapinang ko kakakonis no polong nonini a sowal i, edeng malatolo ko tapangan no rayray —ono Tayal, ono Pariwan, ato no Cuwik. Safaw pito a 'ofadan no tamdaw ko cisowalay tonini a sowal. O roma sato, o sowal no Fotod a tamdaw haw i, o masapapotalay no Sowal no Misatimolay a finacadan i Taywan, o teloc no Patanik hananay a finacadan i Filiping cangra. O sowal no Misatimolay i Taywan i, o tadakakalimelaan no mikingkiway to sowal, enawhani, o ma'araway a kalo'a'adopen ato kalopinalomaloma no 'aya'ayaw a 'orip, ira a ma'araw i finacadan no Taywan. Itini a mahapinang a mafana' kita to o tatapangan nonini a Misatimolay kita o i Taywanay. Pakayni tonini a sowal ato ma'araway a kalomaamaan, paso'lin ko 'alomanay a hakasi^ no mikingkiway to sowal, o tatapangan no Misatimolay a finacadan ko Taywan saan. O micidekay a kasasiroma no Sowal no Misatimolay a finacadan itiniay i Taywan haw i, materek ko i 'aya'ayaway a katelangay a sowal ato rayray no 'orip no itiya:ay ho a tamdaw. O ngiha' no sowal, sepat ko tatapangan a ngiha',o padamaay a ngiha' haw i, ira ko masapinangay ato makalengay, nikaorira caay kasadak ko fali, caay ka matiya o ngarngar no holam ko sowal no Misatimoaly, o makakafitay ko tilid, ira ko lamit ira ko ciping,makakafit kora haw i, masapokopokoh ko tilid. Pakayniay i cefang no sowal i, o damac ko pakakafitay ta masapinang masongila'ay a tengilen ko sowal.
S.PHON: == so~uwaɾ no~u satimo~uɾaj-kanatanataɾ == o~u so~uwaɾ no~usatimo~uɾaj-kanatanataɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan o~u so~uwaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u~u ħan no~u mita o~u ʡamis, to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~u ira ko~u to~uɾo~u ko~u nika sasiro~umaro~uma no~u so~uwaɾ, ano~u so~uŋiɾaʡən ħaʦa a misapinaŋ ko~u kakako~unis no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~unini a so~uwaɾ i, əɬ~ɮəŋ maɾato~uɾo~u ko~u tapaŋan no~u rajraj *o~uno~u tajaɾ, o~uno~u pariwan, ato~u no~u ʦo~u~uwik. safaw pito~u a ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʦiso~uwaɾaj to~unini a so~uwaɾ. o~u ro~uma sato~u, o~u so~uwaɾ no~u fo~uto~uɬ~ɮ a tamɬ~ɮaw ħaw i, o~u masapapo~utaɾaj no~u so~uwaɾ no~u misatimo~uɾaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i tajwan, o~u təɾo~uʦ no~u patanik ħananaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan i fiɾipiŋ ʦaŋra. o~u so~uwaɾ no~u misatimo~uɾaj i tajwan i, o~u taɬ~ɮakakaɾiməɾaan no~u mikiŋkiwaj to~u so~uwaɾ, ənawħani, o~u maʡarawaj a kaɾo~uʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən ato~u kaɾo~upinaɾo~umaɾo~uma no~u ʡajaʡajaw a ʡo~urip, ira a maʡaraw i finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u tajwan. itini a maħapinaŋ a mafanaʡ kita to~u o~u tatapaŋan no~unini a misatimo~uɾaj kita o~u i tajwanaj. pakajni to~unini a so~uwaɾ ato~u maʡarawaj a kaɾo~umaamaan, paso~uʡɾin ko~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a ħakasiʔ no~u mikiŋkiwaj to~u so~uwaɾ, o~u tatapaŋan no~u misatimo~uɾaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u tajwan saan. o~u miʦiɬ~ɮəkaj a kasasiro~uma no~u so~uwaɾ no~u misatimo~uɾaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan itiniaj i tajwan ħaw i, matərək ko~u i ʡajaʡajawaj a katəɾaŋaj a so~uwaɾ ato~u rajraj no~u ʡo~urip no~u itija:aj ħo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u ŋiħaʡ no~u so~uwaɾ, səpat ko~u tatapaŋan a ŋiħaʡ,o~u paɬ~ɮamaaj a ŋiħaʡ ħaw i, ira ko~u masapinaŋaj ato~u makaɾəŋaj, nikao~urira ʦaaj kasaɬ~ɮak ko~u faɾi, ʦaaj ka matija o~u ŋarŋar no~u ħo~uɾam ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u misatimo~uaɾj, o~u makakafitaj ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u ɾamit ira ko~u ʦipiŋ,makakafit ko~ura ħaw i, masapo~uko~upo~uko~uħ ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. pakajniaj i ʦəfaŋ no~u so~uwaɾ i, o~u ɬ~ɮamaʦ ko~u pakakafitaj ta masapinaŋ maso~uŋiɾaʡaj a təŋiɾən ko~u so~uwaɾ.
